description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a single job called build using the haskell:8.4 Docker image. Define a variable STACK_ROOT set to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.stack. In the build job (default stage) execute the commands: stack config set system-ghc --global true and then stack build --ghc-options -j3. Cache the directories .stack, .stack-work, and target between runs. No additional stages, artifacts, or rules are required.
